metadata.description: Competitive landscape analysis skills for Claude Code — beautiful HTML competitive teardowns for marketing & sales.

plugins.name: vantage
plugins.description: Competitive landscape analysis for marketing & sales teams — Digital Share-of-Voice index, positioning map, competitive matrix, and sales battlecards, delivered as a single beautiful self-contained HTML report. Web-only, no API keys. 9 skills: an umbrella orchestrator plus discover, positioning, website, content, ads, social, battlecard, and monitor specialists.
